basics.name: Atmadeep Ghoshal
basics.label: PhD Researcher
basics.summary: PhD Researcher at the Civic and Responsible AI Lab, King's College London, working on responsible AI for robotics and large language models in non-WEIRD and Global South contexts.

highlights: Advisors: Dr. Martim Brandão, Dr. Ruba Abu-Salma and Dr. Sanjay Modgil
Fully funded NMES Faculty International PhD Studentship
University Gold Medal for standing first class first
University Gold Medal for standing first class first

work.name: Ataraxia Research
work.summary: Building domain-specific harm taxonomies and preference alignment pipelines for regulated industries, with a focus on the Indian sociotechnical context.

work.name: King's College London
work.summary: UK AISI funded project on human-AI collaboration frameworks for autonomous underwater robots.
highlights: Interviewed professionals from UK Army, UK Navy and private bodies on maritime AI autonomy
Conducted quantitative user studies on AI-enabled systems in the maritime sector
Designed and evaluated experiments on human-AI complementarity in maritime operations

work.name: King's College London
work.summary: Contributed to a machine learning system to assess risks of emerging AI technologies using patent data from Lens.org.
highlights: Developed search strings and annotation protocols for security-related AI patents under EU AI Act taxonomies
Annotated 250+ patents for automated risk assessment training datasets
Conducted statistical analysis of patent data across risk categories

work.name: IIIT Delhi
work.summary: CDNM Predoctoral Fellowship investigating the use of social robots in the Global South.

awards.title: King's College London Global Research Grant
NMES Faculty International PhD Studentship
awards.summary: Fully funded studentship for doctoral studies 2024-2028

awards.title: CDNM Predoctoral Fellowship Award
awards.summary: For investigating the use of social robots in the Global South

awards.title: University Gold Medal
awards.summary: First class first in postgraduate sociology program

awards.title: University Gold Medal
